fields.name: message_id
fields.description: Unique identifier for this message exchange between accounts and credit departments

fields.name: sender
fields.description: Originating department that sent the message

fields.name: sent_at
fields.description: Timestamp when the message was sent

fields.name: summary
fields.description: High-level description of the message content and purpose

fields.name: account_balances
fields.description: Collection of account balance snapshots for credit review purposes

children.name: customer_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer who owns the account

children.name: currency
children.description: ISO 4217 currency code for all monetary amounts in this account

children.name: balance
children.description: Current account balance; negative for credit card accounts indicates amount owed

children.name: available_balance
children.description: Balance available for withdrawal or spending after accounting for pending transactions and holds

children.name: pending_transactions
children.description: List of transactions awaiting settlement that affect available balance

children.name: txn_id
children.description: Unique identifier for the pending transaction

children.name: amount
children.description: Monetary amount of the pending transaction

children.name: type
children.description: Direction of the pending transaction relative to the account

children.name: last_updated
children.description: Timestamp when the account balance was last updated in the accounts system

children.name: account_status
children.description: Current operational status of the account

children.name: branch_code
children.description: Code identifying the branch where the account is held
